sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-03-06 06:14
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 40:14
- Elapsed time: 40:21
- Elevation gain: 46 m
- Average heart rate: 172.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 186 bpm
- Average watts: 197.8 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.7 bpm`, ranging from `163.5` to `177.9 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `164.6 spm`, with a working range of `100.5` to `167.4 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `164.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `162.0 spm` (-2.6 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:46 /km` across `6.969 km` in `40:14` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:40 /km` and second-half pace was `5:53 /km` (+12 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.3 bpm` average and `186 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.0 bpm` in the first half and `178.5 bpm` in the second (+12.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `40:14` out of `40:21` elapsed (99.7%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `66.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `17.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `30.8 m` in the first half and `35.8 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
